headline: Jim Cramer Comments On Boston Scientific and Other Medical Equipment Makers

headline: Jim Cramer on Medtronic: “This Long-Term Winner’s Become a Short-Term Loser”
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) was among the stocks Jim Cramer was focused on, as he discussed Mad Money’s latest game plan for the week. Cramer highlighted the company’s share price performance, as he said: Wednesday morning, Medtronic reports. Speaking of jarring, this long-term winner’s become a short-term loser with the stock down 23% year to date. […]

headline: Wolfe Research Downgrades Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX) To Peer Perform
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) is among the 10 Most Oversold S&P 500 Stocks So Far in 2026. On May 29, Wolfe Research downgraded the stock from Outperform to Peer Perform. This marks the end of the firm’s bullish outlook on the stock for four years, with the adjustment coming after the company said sales growth […]

headline: CDT May 2026 - 1999 Called, They Want Their Stock Market Back
